div1.entryFree: Ostent, external show: well studied in a sad o. Merch. II, 2, 205. such fair --s of love, II, 8, 44. giving full trophy, signal and o. quite from himself to God, H5 V Chor. 21 (all external signs of honour. cf. ostentation in Hml. IV, 5, 215). In Per. I, 2, 25 O. Edd. the stint of war, M. Edd. the o. of war.
